question: [File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/util/DatabaseWaiter.java -> Scope: '] [Function: waitForDatabase()] Can an unprivileged external user supply a crafted jdbcUrl pointing to an attacker-controlled host to trigger SSRF via DriverManager.getConnection(), causing the application server to make outbound TCP connections to internal network services?
